recipes.name: Old Fashioned
recipes.method: Stir the bourbon, simple syrup, and bitters in a mixing glass with ice. Strain into a rocks glass with one large ice cube. Garnish with cherry and orange coin.

recipes.name: Perfect Manhattan
recipes.method: Place Maraschino cherry in martini glass. Stir, never shake, all the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice, then strain into glass.

recipes.name: Boulevardier
recipes.method: Stir all the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice. Strain into a rocks glass with a single huge ice cube. Garnish with a lemon peel.

recipes.name: Campfire Cocktail
recipes.method: Stir down all the ingredients over ice. Garnish with an orange twist.

recipes.name: Lion's Tail
recipes.method: Combine bourbon, lime, allspice dram, bitters, and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Shake well and strain into chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: The Sherpa
recipes.method: Build the drink in a whiskey glass, starting with the bitters and ending with the bourbon; add a large cube of ice and stir a few times. Garnish with a lemon twist.

recipes.name: New York Sour
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients (except the wine) into a shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a lowball glass with ice. Drizzle wine on top.

recipes.name: Hot Toddy
recipes.method: Stir bourbon, simple syrup, lemon juice and allspice dram in a mixing glass. Transfer to warmed mug and add boiling water. Garnish with lemon peel. You can forgo the allspice dram if you don't have any on hand.

recipes.name: Irish Coffee
recipes.method: Heat the glass you are serving the drink in with warm water. Once the glass has warmed, remove the water and add the whiskey and brown sugar simple syrup. Stir in the coffee. Top with whipped cream and serve.

recipes.name: Ginger Irishman
recipes.method: Place ice in highball glass. Add whiskey, lime juice and stir well. Add ginger beer and garnish with lime wedge.

recipes.name: Michael Collins
recipes.method: Add all your ingredients except soda into a shaker with ice and shake. Strain into a chilled Collins glass and fill with ice. Top with soda. Garnish with an orange slice and a cherry.

recipes.name: God Father
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients into old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.

recipes.name: Bobby Burns
recipes.method: Stir all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled glass.

recipes.name: Rusty Nail
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients directly into old-fashioned glass filled with ice. Stir gently. Garnish with lemon twist.

recipes.name: The Penicillin
recipes.method: Combine the blended scotch, lemon juice and both syrups in a cocktail shaker. Fill with ice and shake vigorously until the drink is sufficiently chilled. Strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice. Float the whisky on top and garnish with candied ginger.

recipes.name: Martini
recipes.method: Note: Classic = 4:1; Dry = 6:1; Very dry = dash Vermouth. Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain in chilled martini glass. Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with olive.

recipes.name: Jill's Filthy Martini
recipes.method: Add all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes. Shake well. Double strain into chilled martini glass. Garnish with lemon peel and green olive.

recipes.name: Petit Trois Gimlet
recipes.method: Mix in cocktail shaker with ice. Pour into coupe with lime and fresh sage garnish.

recipes.name: Tom Collins
recipes.method: Shake the gin, simple syrup, and lemon juice with ice. Strain into a Collins glass filled with ice. Top with club soda. Add a straw if you have one on hand.

recipes.name: Santa Barbara Negroni
recipes.method: Stir all the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice. Strain into a rocks glass with a single huge ice cube. Garnish with an orange peel.

recipes.name: Aviation
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: John Collins
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients directly into highball glass filled with ice. Stir gently. Garnish with lemon slice and maraschino cherry. Add a dash of Angostura bitters. (Note: Use Old Tom Gin for Tom Collins)

recipes.name: Bee's Knees
recipes.method: Combine the ingredients into a cocktail shaker with one large ice cube and shake vigorously until the drink is chilled. Strain into a chilled cocktail coupe.

recipes.name: Corpse Reviver
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Val's Porch Cocktail
recipes.method: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice. Add lemon juice, simple syrup and bitters. Cover shake until very cold. Strain into a coupe glass. Top with club soda. Garnish with an edible flower.
flags: method had OCR artifacts — corrected to best reading, verify against app

recipes.name: White Lady
recipes.method: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into large cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Bramble
recipes.method: Build over crushed ice, in a rocks glass. Stir, then pour the blackberry liqueur over the top of the drink in a circular fashion. Garnish with a lemon slice, and two blackberries.

recipes.name: Army & Navy
recipes.method: Shake all ingredients together and double strain into coupe glass. Garnish with a lemon twist.

recipes.name: Moscow Mule
recipes.method: Combine the vodka and ginger beer. Add lime juice. Garnish with lime slice.

recipes.name: Sea Breeze
recipes.method: Build all ingredients in a rocks glass filled with ice. Garnish with lime wedge.

recipes.name: Lemon Drop
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass rimmed with sugar, garnish with a slice of lemon.

recipes.name: Kamikaze
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Fuzzy Navel
recipes.method: Pour vodka and schnapps into a highball glass filled with ice cubes. Top with orange juice and stir.

recipes.name: Dirty Martini
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini glass. Garnish with green olive.

recipes.name: Love Potion
recipes.method: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice. Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Cape Cod
recipes.method: Rim a highball glass with lime wedge, and fill with ice cubes. Pour in the vodka and cranberry juice and stir briefly. Squeeze the lime wedge into the drink and drop it in.

recipes.name: Vesper
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Add the garnish.

recipes.name: Fleming's Raspberry Cooler
recipes.method: Mix all ingredients except Perrier in stemless wine glass. Add ice and stir to chill. Pour Perrier into glass and garnish with lime wedge.

recipes.name: Cosmopolitan
recipes.method: Shake all ingredients in cocktail shaker filled with ice. Strain into a large cocktail glass. Garnish with lime slice.

recipes.name: Espresso Martini
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Daiquiri
recipes.method: Rim glass with lime wedge. Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Squeeze lime wedge and drop into drink.

recipes.name: Bacardi
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice cubes, shake well, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Between the Sheets
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes, shake, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Hemingway Special
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake. Strain into double cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Cuba Libre
recipes.method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice. Garnish with lime wedge.

recipes.name: Dark 'N' Stormy
recipes.method: In a highball glass filled with ice add dark rum and top with ginger beer. Garnish with lime wedge.

recipes.name: Mojito
recipes.method: Muddle mint sprigs with sugar and lime juice. Add splash of soda water and fill glass with cracked ice. Pour rum and top with soda water. Garnish with sprig of mint leaves and lime slice. Serve with straw.

recipes.name: Yellow Bird
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Anejo Highball
recipes.method: Shake all ingredients except ginger beer together with ice. Strain into a tall glass filled with ice and top with ginger beer. Garnish with an orange slice.

recipes.name: Airmail
recipes.method: Shake all ingredients except champagne with ice. Strain into a flute and top with champagne. Garnish with a lime twist by rubbing on stem and placing on rim, but do not drop twist into glass.

recipes.name: Mary Pickford
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled large cocktail glass.

recipes.name: Sidecar
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into cocktail glass.

recipes.name: French Connection
recipes.method: Pour all ingredients directly into old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.

recipes.name: Brandy Crusta
recipes.method: Prepare a chilled sour glass by rimming it with a lemon wedge and sugar. Discard the wedge. Loop a long spiral of lemon peel around the glass's interior. Combine the other ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake well, and strain into the prepared glass.

recipes.name: Alexander
recipes.method: Combine all ingredients including whipped cream into shaker. Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Sprinkle with fresh ground nutmeg.

recipes.name: Pisco Sour
recipes.method: Shake and strain into a chilled champagne flute. Dash some Angostura bitters on top.
